summary: PR 2400 is a one-line symbol metadata fix in config/GALE01/symbols.txt, renaming the global function symbol at .text:0x8038E034 from AXDriver_8038E034 to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize while preserving its address, type, size, and scope.

key_files.role: Symbol table entry updated for the function at .text:0x8038E034.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: AXDriver_8038E034 replaced with HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize at .text:0x8038E034

what_changed.text: Changed the symbol name at .text:0x8038E034 from AXDriver_8038E034 to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize.
Kept the symbol metadata unchanged: type:function, size:0x2D8, scope:global.

smart_moves.text: The rename was made in the central GALE01 symbols file rather than through a source-level alias or duplicate declaration.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function's canonical name is known, update the symbol metadata entry directly while preserving address, size, type, and scope unless there is evidence those fields are also wrong.

naming_conventions.text: For the function at .text:0x8038E034, this PR uses HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize as the symbol name instead of the address-style AXDriver_8038E034 placeholder.

notes: The file-level change is fully visible and limited to one symbol rename.
No PR body, review comments, or issue comments were present, so the rationale for the canonical name is not available from this slice.
No build, objdiff, or regression evidence is included; this intake therefore does not claim validation beyond the symbol-table edit shown in the diff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Prefer direct symbol metadata renames over aliases for known canonical function names
accepted_candidate_records.text: This PR corrected a function's canonical name by changing the config/GALE01/symbols.txt entry at .text:0x8038E034 from AXDriver_8038E034 to HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize, preserving the same address, type, size, and scope. It is a small example consistent with keeping one canonical symbol name rather than adding aliases or duplicate declarations.

source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source-owned symbol-table fact and should be reviewed by the curator before promotion.

rejection_notes: Do not infer from this slice why HSD_AudioGetAuxHeapSize is the correct semantic name; the PR body and comments provide no rationale.
